AnchorTest About Features Pricing Blog

About Us

We build tools that get out of your way. No onboarding wizards, no 47-step setup flows. Install it, use it, done.

Founded in 2023 by two people who got tired of software that talks more than it works. Our team is still small — 8 engineers, no managers, no meetings on Wednesdays.

We're remote-first, profitable, and not looking for funding. The product pays for itself and then some.

Our users range from solo freelancers to 500-person engineering orgs. The common thread: they value speed over ceremony.

Features

Real-time sync across all your devices. Edit on your phone, see it on your laptop before you put the phone down.

Full offline support. Not the "we cached the last page" kind — the "rebuild the entire project on a plane" kind.

Keyboard-first UI. Every action has a shortcut. The command palette knows what you want before you finish typing.

Markdown-native. Write in markdown, export to anything. PDF, DOCX, HTML, LaTeX. No lock-in, no proprietary format.

Git integration that doesn't make you think about git. Branch, commit, merge — all behind a clean UI. Or drop to terminal if you prefer.

Pricing

Simple pricing. No "contact sales" tier. No annual commitment traps.

Free
$0
forever
  • 3 projects
  • 1 GB storage
  • Community support
Pro
$12
/month
  • Unlimited projects
  • 50 GB storage
  • Priority support
Team
$8
/user/month
  • Everything in Pro
  • Admin controls
  • SSO & SAML
